name: ExtensionImmunization_AdministeredProduct
title: R5: Product that was administered (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Immunization.administeredProduct` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Immunization.administeredProduct` 0..1 `CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Medication)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Immunization.administeredProduct` 0..1 `CodeableReference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Medication)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Immunization.administeredProduct` has a context of Immunization based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Immunization`.
Element `Immunization.administeredProduct` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
